productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Pink plastic rectangular case Dial style: White dial with light blue and pink hands and print on the dial Strap style: Pink plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Waterproof watch, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
